name: CFC Intangible Asset Basis Increase

eligibility.description: Applies to Controlled Foreign Corporations (CFCs) conducting active research or licensing intangibles, making it easier to pass the PFIC asset test.

description: Increases the adjusted basis of total assets for a CFC by 100% of R&D expenses (last 3 years) and 300% of licensed intangible payments for PFIC testing purposes.
